data.title: Red & Stone Burcht Leiden Unisex Tee | The StudioTJ Signature Collection
data.description:
A flash of brilliant all year autumn color against ancient stone. This shot captures the fleeting beauty of fall, with fiery red leaves clinging to the historic walls of the Leiden Burcht.

This photograph is a quintessential example of The StudioTJ Signature Collection. Its high contrast, punchy blue sky, and dramatic angle deliver the clean, bold aesthetic that defines this collection.

  S M L XL 2XL
Width, in 18.00 20.00 22.00 24.00 26.00
Length, in 28.00 29.00 30.00 31.00 32.00
Sleeve length, in 8.90 9.20 9.50 9.70 10.00
Size tolerance, in 1.50 1.50 1.50 1.50 1.50

Product features
- Made from 100% Airlume combed and ring-spun cotton for ultimate softness.
- Designed with side seams for enhanced shape retention and support.
- Ribbed knit collar maintains its shape and adds a stylish touch.
- Crafted with tear-away label to minimize skin irritation.
- Produced sustainably and ethically, ensuring fair labor practices.

Care instructions
- Machine wash: cold (max 30C or 90F)
- Non-chlorine: bleach as needed
- Tumble dry: low heat
- Iron, steam or dry: medium heat
- Do not dryclean

data.title: Red & Stone the Burcht Leiden Woman's Tee | The StudioTJ Signature Collection
data.description:
A flash of brilliant all year autumn color against ancient stone. This shot captures the fleeting beauty of fall, with fiery red leaves clinging to the historic walls of the Leiden Burcht.

This photograph is a quintessential example of The StudioTJ Signature Collection. Its high contrast, punchy blue sky, and dramatic angle deliver the clean, bold aesthetic that defines this collection.

Embrace comfort and style with this Women's Cotton Tee. Crafted from soft, breathable fabric, this tee keeps you feeling relaxed while looking effortlessly chic. Its versatile design makes it perfect for casual outings, cozy weekends at home, or lounging with friends. Ideal for women who appreciate both comfort and fashion, this tee adds a touch of elegance to any wardrobe. Celebrate everyday moments, or consider it a thoughtful gift for birthdays, holidays, or just because. Make it a staple in your collection or surprise someone special with this trendy and comfortable shirt!

 

  S M L XL 2XL
Width, in 18.50 20.00 22.01 24.00 25.98
Length, in 25.25 26.00 26.69 27.50 28.25


Product features
- Durable double-needle sleeve and bottom hems for long-lasting wear.
- Seamless ribbed knit collar retains its shape even after multiple washes.
- Neck and shoulder tape stabilizes seams, ensuring perfect fit and comfort.
- Made from 100% cotton providing soft texture; heather options available.
- Lightweight fabric offering a relaxed fit, perfect for any season.

Care instructions
- Machine wash: cold (max 30C or 90F)
- Do not bleach
- Do not tumble dry
- Iron, steam or dry: low heat
- Do not dryclean

data.title: Red & Stone Burcht Leiden Cotton Canvas Tote Bag with Artistic Photographic Print
data.description:
A flash of brilliant all year autumn color against ancient stone. This shot captures the fleeting beauty of fall, with fiery red leaves clinging to the historic walls of the Leiden Burcht.

This durable tote, made from 100% cotton canvas, perfectly combines functionality with trendy design, making it an essential accessory for shoppers, travelers, and everyone in between. Its simplistic yet chic appearance allows it to fit seamlessly into casual outings, beach days, and grocery trips. Ideal for eco-conscious individuals who love to reduce plastic waste while carrying their essentials with ease. Perfect for holidays like Earth Day, birthdays, or any casual celebration, this tote bag is a thoughtful gift for friends, family, or even yourself!

  15" x 16"
Width, in 15.00
Length, in 16.00
Handle length, in 20.00

 
Product features
- 100% Cotton canvas for durability and strength.
- Flat corners design for a neat and elegant look.
- Reinforced self-fabric carrying handles for comfort.
- Heavy fabric (12 oz/yd²) provides sturdiness.
- Available in both natural and black colors for versatile styling.

Care instructions
- Do not iron directly over the printed area - print may stick to the iron.
- Spot clean
- Do not bleach
- Line dry

data.title: A Window in Time Burcht Leiden Moody Woman's Tee | The Monochrome Moods Collection
data.description:
Peer through a window into history. This powerful monochrome image captures the view from within the ancient citadel walls, focusing on the interplay between the deep, textured shadow of the stone and the light beyond.

This image perfectly captures the essence of The Monochrome Moods Collection. Its dramatic lighting and potent black and white conversion create the powerful and evocative statement that this collection is known for.

Embrace comfort and style with this Women's Cotton Tee. Crafted from soft, breathable fabric, this tee keeps you feeling relaxed while looking effortlessly chic. Its versatile design makes it perfect for casual outings, cozy weekends at home, or lounging with friends. Ideal for women who appreciate both comfort and fashion, this tee adds a touch of elegance to any wardrobe. Make it a staple in your collection or surprise someone special with this trendy and comfortable shirt!

- Durable double-needle sleeve and bottom hems for long-lasting wear.
- Seamless ribbed knit collar retains its shape even after multiple washes.
- Neck and shoulder tape stabilizes seams, ensuring perfect fit and comfort.
- Made from 100% cotton providing soft texture; heather options available.
- Lightweight fabric offering a relaxed fit, perfect for any season.

Care instructions

- Do not bleach
- Do not tumble dry

data.title: Sacred Geometry Leiden Cotton Canvas Tote Bag with Artistic Photographic Print
data.description:
Discover the beauty of architectural geometry in this unique corner perspective of the Hooglandse Kerk. This image moves beyond the traditional view, focusing on the interplay of soaring Gothic lines, the rich texture of the ancient brick, and elegant stone details. It's a celebration of the complex, powerful forms of this sacred landmark.

data.title: Leiden's Historic High Church | The Signature Collection
data.description:
Capture the timeless beauty of the Hooglandse Kerk, a masterpiece of Gothic architecture in the heart of Leiden. This image showcases the magnificent brick exterior and soaring windows of the historic church, a symbol of the city's rich heritage. A powerful and classic view of one of Leiden's most iconic landmarks.

Product features
- 2-piece hood for added warmth and style
- Dropped shoulders for a relaxed fit
- Pouch pocket for convenient storage
- Certified by OEKO-TEX Standard 100 for sustainable manufacturing practices
- Produced in a facility partnered with Fair Labor Association and WRAP certified

Care instructions
- Machine wash: cold (max 30C or 90F), gentle cycle
- Non-chlorine: bleach as needed
- Tumble dry: low heat
- Iron, steam or dry: low heat
- Do not dryclean

data.title: The Haarlem Windmill Atmospheric Mug 11oz 15oz
data.description:
A moment of tranquility from the Dutch countryside. This iconic windmill, reflected in the still canal waters, brings a sense of timeless peace and classic beauty.

Product features
- Vibrant colors with latest printing techniques
- Available in two sizes: 11oz and 15oz
- Microwave and dishwasher safe
- Lead and BPA-free
- Suitable for adults

Care instructions
- Clean in dishwasher (put the product on top rack), or wash by hand with warm water and dish soap

data.title: Celestial Geometry Haarlem Dome Monochrome Ceramic Mug 11oz 15oz
data.description:
Look up and get lost in mesmerizing patterns. This image captures the stunning symmetry of a grand dome, transforming architectural genius into a captivating study of form and light.

Stripped to its essential elements of light, shadow, and form. This image transforms stone and sky into a powerful study of texture and timeless design. Relevant for Dutch-themed decor, art lovers, and those who enjoy unique and captivating designs. Perfect for birthdays, housewarmings, or as a special gift for those who appreciate striking visuals.

data.title: Urban Construction Amsterdam Bijlmer Unisex Tee | The StudioTJ Signature Collection
data.description:
A powerful architectural form ascends into a dramatic sky. This piece captures a fleeting moment where modern design meets the raw texture of the clouds

This photograph is a quintessential example of The StudioTJ Signature Collection. Its high contrast, punchy blue sky, and dramatic angle deliver the clean, bold aesthetic that defines this collection.
